---
title: "Regional Scope"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
```

This chapter lists source mappings in appendix frontmatter for UGC and Ads. Paths are shortened by removing the leading `data/2025/` prefix.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.regional_scope import generate_unexpected_links_table
from IPython.display import HTML, display

display(HTML(generate_unexpected_links_table()))
```
